うわぁ～～～！ 遅刻遅刻～～～！<br>衛兵と娼婦の二足のわらじはやっぱりしんど:
Waaaah! I'm late, I'm late! Juggling guard and courtesan work is really
wearing me out!
（……って、しまった。押収品の違法媚薬を持ってきちゃった……。<br>こんな怪し:
(... Crap, I brought the confiscated illegal aphrodisiac... Wish I could
send this shady stuff to HQ and let them deal with it.)
（間違って誰かが使わないように、ルディアさんに預かってもらおうかな？<br>ルデ:
(Maybe I'll ask Ludia to hold onto it so nobody uses it by mistake? I
wonder if she's at the shop...)
あたた……ご、ごめんね、ぶつかっちゃって。<br>遅刻しそうで、先を急いでたんだ:
Owww... S-sorry, I bumped into you. I was rushing 'cause I'm late. Are
you hurt?
はい。それより……大丈夫ですか？<br>びしょびしょですけど……: I'm fine. More importantly... are you all right? You're drenched...
あぁっ！？ 違法媚薬が全身に！？: Ah! The illegal aphrodisiac got all over me!
……でも、特になんともないなぁ。<br>なんだ、不良品か。: ...but I don't feel any different. What a dud.
ともかく気にしないで！<br>私、これから仕事だから、急いで着替えなきゃ！ また:
Anyway, don't worry about it! I've gotta get to work, so I need to
change quickly! See you!
はぁー……なーんか、だるいなぁ。仕事の疲れが溜まってるのかな？<br>でも、なん:
*pant*... I feel kinda sluggish. Maybe it's just work fatigue? But my
body feels kind of hot, maybe feverish...
風邪ではないみたいだけど……。<br>まあ、お客さんを待たせるのも悪いし。とりあ:
Doesn't seem like a cold... Well, I shouldn't keep customers waiting.
Guess I'll get to work.
きゅ、急になんなんだいったい！？ や、やめろぉ！？: Wha-what's the big deal all of a sudden! S-stop it!
